title: verbascum × dervichorum
intro: Verbascum × dervichorum, also known as the hybrid mullein, is a rare and unique flowering plant resulting from a cross between Verbascum blattaria and Verbascum thapsus. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, with its leaves and flowers containing mucilage, saponins, and flavonoids, which have anti-inflammatory and antibacterial effects. The health benefits of Verbascum × dervichorum include soothing respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as reducing inflammation and improving wound healing. In herbal preparations, the leaves and flowers can be used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat various health conditions, although more research is needed to fully understand its effects.
